title: QDC Transport
description: This Mod provides several nodes to allow item transport between blocks with inventories,such as furnaces and chests.
body:
**NOTE: This mod is no longer maintained on this project, it has been added as part of the new QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft version.**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0)

This Mod provides several nodes to allow item transport betveen blocks with inventories,such as furnaces and chests.

Each item transport Network must have a controller, which connects to the transfer nodes on the back side of the node, this does not incluse Item Placers and Item Extractors.

The Controller node needs to supplied with a redstone source such as a lever.

Item Placers and Item Extractors need to be placed in front of the node, the opposite needs to be facing a block with an inventory.

Not all "output" sides of the nodes need to be connected to something, items will not fall out.

Right click with no items in hand to rotate the nodes.

A small amount of Nature Particles are used as fuel, 0.1 particles are used for each item transferred.

A part of the mod allows the player to teleport from one Player Transporter block to a Player transport Platform block some distance in front of it.

Also this mod allows the player to hover when using the AntiGravity Wand.
